title: Arab teams at 2026 World Cup: Algeria wins over Jordan while Iraq concedes against France

snapshot.title: Arab teams at 2026 World Cup: Algeria wins over Jordan while Iraq concedes against France
snapshot.description: PHILADELPHIA: Jordan failed to secure a win in its second World Cup game in California against Algeria on Tuesday. After dominating the first half of the game with a goal by Nizar Al Rashdan in minute 36, Jordan conceded two goals to Algeria. With one game left, Jordan is set to face off reigning champions Argentina and Algeria is set to play Austria on Sunday. Meanwhile,
snapshot.author: Agencies
snapshot.pageTitle: Arab teams at 2026 World Cup: Algeria wins over Jordan while Iraq concedes against France | Arab News
